title: Greg Fleming (rugby league)
extract:
Greg Fleming (born 29 January 1973 in Newcastle, New South Wales) is an Australian former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. His position of choice was as a fullback or centre.
He played for Perth Reds and Canterbury-Bankstown Bulldogs in the NRL. In the Super League he played for London Broncos.
